title: Residential 2D/3D Interior Design
skills: 2D DRAFTING | 2D Drafting | 3D Visualization | 3D Architecture | 3D Graphic Design | 3D Modelling | 3D Rendering | 3ds Max | Interior Design
full_description:
I’m refreshing my home and need a full interior concept rendered in both 2-D plans and 3-D visuals. The project covers three key areas—living room, bedroom, and kitchen—within a residential setting. I’m after a distinctly European style: clean lines, refined detailing, and a balanced mix of comfort and elegance.

Here’s what I would like to receive: 
• Scaled 2-D floor plans that show furniture placement, lighting points, and clear circulation paths 
• Photorealistic 3-D renders (day and night scenes) that capture materials, colors, and ambience 
• A concise mood board with reference images, color palette, and material samples 
• A specification sheet listing furniture, fixtures, and finishes, along with sourcing links or product codes 
• Editable source files (AutoCAD / Revit for plans, SketchUp / 3ds Max + V-Ray or equivalent for renders) so I can make future tweaks if needed 

Accuracy is essential: dimensions must match supplied measurements, and the 3-D images should faithfully reflect the 2-D layouts. If you work in another comparable toolset, let me know—flexibility is fine as long as the final output meets these criteria.

Once I share the existing plans and photos, you can start with an initial concept; after one feedback round we’ll move to final renders and documentation. Let’s create a cohesive European-inspired home that feels both timeless and inviting.

Technical guidelines

Acceptance

I need a quote for everything above including maintenance costs. Please also provide a retainer cost for you to manage everything maintenance wise per month or per year.

title: Logistics ERP MVP Build
skills: FLUTTER | Flutter | Google Sheets | App Development | Web Development | PHP | Android | Mobile App Development | Software Architecture
full_description:
I am ready to move a lean logistics ERP from concept to an MVP that we can put in users’ hands within 2–3 weeks. My stack is fixed—FlutterFlow for the multiplatform UI, Firebase for auth + data, and Google Sheets as the quick-and-dirty reporting layer—so you’ll need to be fully comfortable in that toolkit.

The first release must run smoothly on Web, iOS, and Android and support three roles: Admin, Driver, and Client. Core screens and workflows are already sketched; your job is to wire them up, polish the UX, and be sure the following functions work end-to-end:

• Vehicle search by plate or fleet number 
• WhatsApp alerts fired automatically at each status change 
• One-click driver tracking link, live on mobile 
• Daily dispatch report generated from trip data 
• Plant-wise, buyer-wise, and seller-wise pending reports 
• Auto-generated PDF loading sheets 
• Excel export of all key tables 
• KPI dashboard showing Pending, Completed, and Delayed vehicles at a glance

Acceptance 
1. All features above demonstrated on Web, iOS, and Android simulators. 
2. Role-based access enforced (Admin full control, Driver limited to assigned loads, Client read-only on their orders). 
3. Data persisted in Firebase, sheets synced. 
4. Clean, commented FlutterFlow project handed over with build instructions.

If you have shipped production apps with this exact trio—FlutterFlow, Firebase, Google Sheets—let’s talk and lock a timeline.

title: Parcel Locker DLL Development
skills: STM32 | STM32 | API Development | Visual Studio | Embedded Systems | C++ Programming | C Programming | C# Programming | Software Architecture
full_description:
Our parcel-locker kiosks run on a Windows fat-client with a touchscreen front-end that talks to a Windows .NET service. That service now needs a native C++ DLL that can in turn drive the locker control board, which is built around an STM32 microcontroller.

What the DLL must do 
• Accept a compartment number and trigger the STM32 board to unlock/open that door. 
• Query the board to confirm whether a specific compartment door is currently open or closed. 

Technical expectations 
The library should expose a small, clean C-style API so it can be P/Invoked from the existing .NET service. Please write it in modern C++ (Visual Studio tool-chain) and make the calls non-blocking and thread-safe. Any board communication (currently handled over the board’s existing serial link) should be abstracted so the service never has to deal with low-level protocol details.

Deliverables 
1. Compiled 64-bit DLL and matching import library 
2. Header file with function prototypes and brief inline docs 
3. Short developer guide (PDF or markdown) explaining build steps, deployment, and sample C# usage 
4. Source code, ready to build under Visual Studio, with clear comments

Acceptance 
I will connect the DLL to a test kiosk; a door must open and status must report accurately on the first try, with no memory leaks detected by Visual Studio’s diagnostics.

If you have previous STM32 or kiosk-control experience, please mention it so we can move quickly.

Responsive Layout: A modular interface designed to handle different screen sizes while maintaining a clean, professional aesthetic.

Technical Stack
Frontend: React.js, Vite, and CSS-in-JS (inline styles) for a modular UI.

Backend: FastAPI (Python), providing a robust REST API layer for data handling.

Database: SQLite (via [login to view URL]), providing a lightweight and efficient local storage solution.

Persistence: Uses localStorage to bridge the gap between sessions for theme preferences and client-side cached data.

Project Vision
The project is clearly intended for operational efficiency. It automates the tracking of clients and tasks, reducing the administrative burden on a business. It is a "dashboard-first" application, prioritizing visual clarity and quick access to actionable business intelligence.

title: Book Marketing & Brand Manager
skills: DIGITAL MARKETING | Digital Marketing | Social Media Management | SEO | Content Marketing | YouTube Video Editing | Video Production | Video Editing | Marketing Strategy
full_description:
# Hiring: Book Marketing & Author Brand Growth Manager

**Location:** Remote – India
**Engagement:** Initial 90-Day Contract, Extendable
**Book Category:** * Business Book *

We are looking for a creative, commercially focused and execution-driven **Book Marketing & Author Brand Growth Manager** to promote the business book and build the author’s digital presence.

## About the Book

*This Book* is a field-tested operator’s guide to cross-border electronics trading.

The book covers real-world subjects including international trade, supplier management, compliance, currency exposure, cash flow, thin margins, counterfeit risk, taxation, logistics and business survivability.

Its target readers include:

* Importers, exporters and international traders
* Mobile phone and electronics industry professionals
* Entrepreneurs and SME owners
* Supply-chain and logistics professionals
* Business consultants and advisors
* Management students and aspiring global entrepreneurs

## Key Responsibilities

### Social Media and Content

* Develop and execute a 90-day book-promotion strategy.
* Manage content for LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook and YouTube.
* Convert chapters, stories and lessons from the book into engaging posts, carousels, Reels and YouTube Shorts.
* Create a monthly content calendar.
* Support the author in recording videos remotely.
* Edit short-form videos with captions, hooks and suitable visual elements.
* Build the author’s positioning as an experienced cross-border trade operator and industry thought leader.

### Book Sales and Amazon Optimisation

* Review and improve the Amazon book description, keywords, categories, Author Central profile and A+ Content.
* Create campaigns that direct relevant readers to the book’s Amazon page.
* Track book sales before and after campaigns.
* Recommend and manage Amazon or social media advertising, subject to prior approval.
* Develop partnerships with business communities, colleges, trade groups and professional associations.

### Reviews and Reader Outreach

* Identify relevant book reviewers, bloggers, entrepreneurs, traders, business leaders and industry professionals.
* Coordinate complimentary review copies for genuine and independent consideration.
* Follow up professionally without influencing or dictating the reviewer’s opinion.
* Build a database of reviewers and potential book advocates.
* Encourage genuine readers to share honest feedback after reading the book.


### SEO, Articles and PR

* Research relevant keywords connected with cross-border trade, electronics trading, business survivability, international expansion, compliance and entrepreneurship.
* Write and publish high-quality SEO articles based on the book’s subjects.
* Identify suitable business websites, trade publications, LinkedIn newsletters and media platforms.
* Pitch the author for podcasts, interviews, guest articles, panel discussions and business events.
* Prepare press releases, media pitches and author profiles.
* Build genuine, relevant backlinks through editorial coverage and valuable content—not bulk directory submissions.

### Analytics and Reporting

* Submit a weekly activity report.
* Provide a monthly report covering:

 * Content published
 * Reach and engagement
 * Website and Amazon traffic
 * Reader enquiries and email leads
 * Review outreach
 * Media and podcast approaches
 * PR coverage
 * Advertising expenditure
 * Book sales attributable to campaigns
* Recommend improvements based on actual performance data.

## Monthly Deliverables

The expected monthly output will normally include:

* 15–16 social media posts and carousels
* 8–12 Reels or YouTube Shorts
* 1–2 long-form videos or author interviews
* 2–4 original SEO articles
* 40–60 targeted PR, podcast, reviewer or influencer approaches
* One email or reader-community campaign
* Weekly reporting and one monthly strategy review

## Candidate Requirements

* Minimum 2–4 years of experience in digital marketing, content marketing, book promotion, author branding or personal-brand marketing.
* Strong written and spoken English.
* Ability to write intelligent business content rather than generic promotional captions.
* Experience with LinkedIn, Instagram and YouTube content.
* Working knowledge of Canva and video-editing tools such as CapCut, Premiere Pro or similar.
* Basic understanding of SEO, keyword research, Google Analytics and Search Console.
* Experience with media pitching, podcast outreach or influencer collaborations.
* Ability to work independently and deliver according to agreed deadlines.
* Strong understanding of analytics, campaign performance and sales conversion.

Experience promoting books, courses, consultants, business leaders or professional-service brands will be strongly preferred.

## Compensation

* Monthly fixed compensation based on experience.
* Additional performance incentives based on agreed and measurable results.
* Initial engagement will be for 90 days and may be extended based on performance.

Advertising, book copies, approved influencer fees and paid media expenses will be funded separately.

## How to Apply

Please send:

1. Your CV or professional profile.
2. Links to social media accounts or brands you have managed.
3. Samples of posts, articles, Reels and videos created by you.
4. Examples of book, author, course or personal-brand campaigns you have handled.
5. Screenshots or evidence of campaign results.
6. Your expected monthly compensation.
7. A brief 90-day proposal explaining how you would promote 
8. Three sample content ideas for the book.
9. Five podcasts, publications, communities or influencers you would initially approach.

Please do not apply with a generic proposal. Applications demonstrating an understanding of the book and its target readers will be given preference.
description_snippet: # Hiring: Book Marketing & Author Brand Growth Manager **Location:** Remote – India **Engagement:** Initial 90-Day Contract, Extendable **Book Category:** * Business Book * We are looking for a creative, commercially focused and execution-driven **Bo

Turnaround is important—I’d like to see the first diagnostics within 48 hours and the final approval within a reasonable review window.

full_description:
I want to build an automation-building tool that has artificial intelligence at its core and is tailored specifically to steel structures. Here’s the big picture of what I need:

• The AI layer must analyse inputs such as span, load combinations, regional code requirements and preferred member libraries, then generate an initial steel frame layout automatically. 
• Users should be able to override choices, and the system has to retrain itself on those corrections so the next project starts closer to the mark. 
• Code-checking and simple finite-element verification should happen in the background, flagging any members that do not meet strength or serviceability criteria. 
• A clean, modern interface (web or desktop) is essential for quick data entry and for exporting results to industry-standard formats like IFC, DWG or even a straight Bill of Materials CSV. 
• I prefer Python for the back end because of its strong AI libraries (TensorFlow / PyTorch), but I’m open to alternatives if you make a convincing case. 

Acceptance criteria 
1. A working prototype that can create a basic portal frame in structural steel, complete with sizing and code check, from only span, bay spacing, and load inputs. 
2. Evidence of learning: after manually adjusting at least five member sizes, the next generated frame should reproduce 60 % or more of those changes without intervention. 
3. Export files open correctly in Tekla Structures or equivalent BIM package without data loss.

If you have experience blending structural engineering logic with machine-learning workflows, let’s talk about how quickly we can move from concept to a usable MVP.

title: 2-2.4 GHz Meta-Absorber Design
skills: ELECTRONICS | Electronics | PCB Design and Layout | Telecommunications Engineering | 3D Modelling | Mechanical Design | Engineering Drawing | Technical Documentation | Research and Development
full_description:
This project centres on a metamaterial absorber that will operate between 2 GHz and 2.4 GHz for a telecommunications platform. I am using Rogers 4350B with a 1.524 mm thickness, so every simulation and layout must respect that specific substrate stack-up. The finished surface should maintain more than 92 % absorption across the entire band while remaining both angle and polarization insensitive; incidence from 0 ° up to 60 °—for TE and TM, normal as well as oblique—has to meet the same performance target.

Because the unit will be installed in a coastal environment, the design must tolerate sustained high humidity without performance drift. A manually adjustable feature is required; a simple, reliable way to trim or retune the absorber after fabrication (for example by replaceable lumped elements, screw-tuned posts, or similar low-complexity means) will satisfy this need as long as the adjustment range preserves the key specs.

Please base the work on full-wave EM simulation (CST Microwave Studio, HFSS, or an equivalent recognised tool) and provide: 
• 3-D model and project files for all simulations 
• S-parameter, absorption, and angular-sweep plots demonstrating the > 92 % target for both polarizations 
• Gerber or DXF layers ready for PCB manufacture, plus a concise fabrication note covering the humidity-resistant finish you recommend 
• A short tuning guide explaining the manual adjustment procedure and its expected effect on resonance

Testing or measurement plans are welcome if you have lab access, but validated simulation backed by clear documentation will be the primary acceptance criterion.
